name: municipal_services_biometric_millhaven_jus_mer
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Municipal Services, the situation tagged internally around municipal services biometric millhaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both justice and mercy; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elliot Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Elliot Ishikawa, the accountable executive on this bridge in Municipal Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Sana Ishikawa, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Municipal Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Elliot Ishikawa must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Elliot Ishikawa do?
